debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
⊢ sSup (⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) = ⊤

proof:
have h : sSup (⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) = sSup (SetLike.coe D) := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · apply sSup_le
        intro x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
        obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
        calc x ≤ sSup (B N hN) := le_sSup hxB
          _ = N := (hB N hN).symm
          _ ≤ sSup (SetLike.coe D) := le_sSup hN
      · apply sSup_le
        intro N hN
        rw [hB N hN]
        apply sSup_le_sSup
        intro x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]
        exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rw [h, D.sSup_eq_top]
failed_attempts:
have h : sSup (⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) = sSup (SetLike.coe D) := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · apply sSup_le
        intro x hx
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
        obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := hx
        have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hxB
        exact le_sSup_of_le hN hxN
      · apply sSup_le
        intro N hN
        rw [hB N hN]
        apply sSup_le
        intro x hx
        apply le_sSup
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]
        exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rw [h, D.sSup_eq_top]

have h : sSup (⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) = sSup (SetLike.coe D) := by

        exact le_trans this (le_sSup hN)
      · apply sSup_le
        intro N hN
        rw [hB N hN]
        apply sSup_le
        intro x hx
        apply le_sSup
        simp only [Set.mem_iUnion]
        exact ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    rw [h, D.sSup_eq_top]

rw [← D.sSup_eq_top]
    apply le_antisymm
